Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/11/2025
Iron ore futures con nued their strong, vola le trend today. The main contract I2601 closed at 797, a slight increase of 0.19% comparedto the previous trading day. Traders adjusted their sales strategies in line with market condi ons, while steel mills showed decent inquiry ac vity and made purchases at lower prices.
